raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Work-sharing, or short-time compensation, allows employers to reduce employee hours during an economic downturn while providing prorated unemployment benefit payments to employees.",
    "The current application process for the state's Work Share Program is underutilized due to it being administratively burdensome.",
    "The Work Share Program can help employers retain trained workers during economic downturns.",
    "Employees participating in the Work Share Program can keep their benefits while working reduced hours.",
    "Streamlining the application process for the Work Share Program may increase employer participation."
  ]
}
```
